title: Sapucay: My Hometown
overview: A friendly priest, always open to spontaneous grace and everyday philosophy, guides the residents of Sapucay, a small and forgotten town in the province of Corrientes, in their protest against the mayor's intention to close the only school in the area to build a casino in its place.
